ie.updateNote: Wildfires Large-scales fires and extreme temperatures can affect a number of areas in Greece. Travellers should check with their travel operator or agency, or hotel, prior to travel to see if the area they plan to visit is impacted by current wildfires and evacuations. As wildfires are highly dangerous and unpredictable, Irish citizens should stay away from affected areas; comply with evacuation o
